titles.en: Chapter on the Dislike of Receiving Payment for Judging
Chapter on the Dislike of Receiving Payment for Judging

segments: : سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ قَاضٍ بَيْنَ قَرْيَتَيْنِ يَأْخُذُ مِنَ اَلسُّلْطَانِ عَلَى اَلْقَضَاءِ اَلرِّزْقَ فَقَالَ "ذَاكَ سُحْتٌ".
arabic.text: : سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ قَاضٍ بَيْنَ قَرْيَتَيْنِ يَأْخُذُ مِنَ اَلسُّلْطَانِ عَلَى اَلْقَضَاءِ اَلرِّزْقَ فَقَالَ "ذَاكَ سُحْتٌ".

segments:
Hadith.3227 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan who said:
Abu Abdillah (as) was asked about a judge between two villages who takes a salary from the ruler for judging.
Imam (as) said: "That is unlawful (suht)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3227 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan who said:

Imam (as) said: "That is unlawful (suht)."
